description_long: This is a light-colored bucket hat made from a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend. The hat features a downward-sloping, wide brim that encircles the entire crown, providing ample shade and sun protection. The crown is rounded and slightly slouchy, with visible stitching along the seams and brim, giving it a casual, utilitarian appearance. The brim edge is unfinished or frayed, adding a rugged, worn-in look. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or embellishments on the exterior. The overall design is practical and understated, suitable for everyday urban wear or outdoor activities.
description: A light-colored, fabric bucket hat with a wide, downward-sloping brim and a rounded, slouchy crown. The brim edge is frayed, and the hat is free of visible decorations or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded crown and the wide, frayed brim with visible seam lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slouchy profile of the crown and the continuous brim with a slightly uneven edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curve of the crown and the full circular brim with frayed edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slouchy crown and the irregular, unfinished brim edge.
